caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the text "I DON NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with framed photographs on the wall behind him and white mannequins wearing white shirts in the background. Clothing racks are visible further back. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left that reads "PODCAST" and one on the right that reads "BOSSELLY POT". As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his facial expressions and head position while talking, momentarily looking down and then back toward the microphone. The background elements, including the photos and clothing displays, remain static throughout the clip.
